title: The Active Bride — A Discussion Guide
notebook_title: The Active Bride and the Empowering Head

entries.notebooklm_title: Biblical headship and the active bride
entries.customize_prompt: Debate between two believers who share one Bible (not believers vs. skeptics): one host gives the strongest, fairest case for the traditional male-leadership/wifely-submission reading; the other responds from the sources. Lay audience, plain language.
